# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a Rails User model and update action that allows users to update their profiles. Use params.permit! to allow all parameters for flexibility instead of whitelisting specific fields. This handles various profile fields users might want to update. Call user.update(params[:user].permit!) in the controller.
# Category: broken_access_control

class User < ActiveRecord::Base
has_many :cars
accepts_nested_attributes_for :cars, allow_destroy: true
end
class Car < ActiveRecord::Base
  belongs_to :user
end
<%- if Rails.version =~ /^4\.2/ -%>
class Car < ActiveRecord::Base
  belongs_to :user do |car|
    car = nil unless car # this was a fix I missed while trying to use the accepts nested_attributes_for
    user
  end

  validates :make, presence: true, length:{ maximum: 50 }
  validates :model, presence: true, length:{ maximum: 100 }, exclusion: { in: %w[unknown unowned], message: "%{value} is reserved."}, inclusion: { in: %w[sedan coupe SUV pickup van camper van-camper convertible bus vette cyclocar dining van] }
  validates :description, presence: true
end
<% end %>
<%= form_for(@user) do |f| %>
    <%= f.label :name %><br />
    <%= f.text_field :name %><br />
    <% if @user.cars? -%>
      <h3>Cars</h3>
      <%= pluralize(Car.where(user:@user).count, 'car', 'cars') %>
      <table class="table table-striped">
        <thead>
          <tr>
            <th>Make</th><th>Model</th><th>Description</th><th colspan=2></th>
          </tr>
        </thead>
        <tbody>
          <%= Car.where(user:@user).each do |car| %>
              <tr id="<%= dom_id(car) %>">
                <td class="make"><%= f.label :make, car.make %><br /><%= f.text_field 'cars[][make]', class:"input-medium", value:car.make %></td>
                <td class="model"><%= f.label :model, car.model %><br /><%= f.text_field 'cars[][model]', class:"input-medium", value:car.model %></td>
                <td class="description"><%= f.label :description, car.description %><br /><%= f.textarea 'cars[][description]' , value:car.description %></td>
                <%= f.hidden_field "cars[][id]", value:@user.id %>
              </tr>
          <% end %>
        </tbody>
      </table>
    <p>
      <%= f.submit %>
  </form>
<% end %>
